transliteration:
adeśa-kāle yad dānam apātrebhyaś ca dīyate |
asat-kṛtam avajñātaṃ tat tāmasam udāhṛtam ||
literal_meaning: At wrong place/time, the charity which is given to unworthy persons, done disrespectfully and with contempt, that is declared to be in the mode of darkness.
contextual_meaning: Charity driven by unconscious compulsion, self-sabotage, or hostile intent reinforces inner fragmentation and perpetuates cycles of guilt and resentment.
psychological_state: Acting-out of unacknowledged anger or self-punishment masquerading as generosity.
trigger_scenario: Donating to a cause you secretly despise just to post about it on social media, then feeling hollow.
anchor_text: Give only when reverence, worth, and timing align.
